summary: Completed comprehensive testing of financial system improvements. Most features working correctly - sidebar collapsible, DRE export buttons, year filtering, Fluxo de Caixa page, and Relatórios comparative analysis with AV/AH toggles are all implemented. Minor session management issues detected.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Timeout error during chart of accounts creation
flaky_endpoints.symptoms: 10 second timeout on standard account creation
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Other endpoints work fine, data creation successful through alternative methods

ui_bugs.issue: Session management - occasional redirects to login page during navigation

integration_issues.issue: Daily cash flow table not loading/displaying properly

passed_tests: Backend API health check (93.3% success rate)
DRE page Excel export button present
DRE page PDF export button present
DRE page 'Criar Plano Padrão' button correctly removed
DRE page year selector with data filtering
DRE page hierarchical structure with proper categories
Fluxo de Caixa page navigation and basic loading
Relatórios page AV% (Análise Vertical) toggle button
Relatórios page AH% (Análise Horizontal) toggle button
Relatórios page date filters for both comparison periods (4 filters found)
Professional UI design with proper Brazilian Portuguese labels
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session management to prevent occasional login redirects during navigation
